audit_items.proof_trace: performUpkeep correctly re-validates all three conditions using fresh storage reads: auctionStart is re-checked at L327 (`s_auctionStarts[asset]`), params/decimals are re-read from storage at L331-336, and minSize is re-evaluated with a fresh oracle price (L342) and fresh `assetParams.minAuctionSizeUsd` (L346). The stale `eligibleAssets[i].amount` from checkUpkeep is implicitly anchored to reality by the `safeTransfer` in `transferForSwap` (L321) which reverts if the feeAggregator's current balance cannot cover the stale amount, preventing any auction from starting on assets that no longer have sufficient balance.
